sql: select count(distinct support_tickets.id) as value, accounts.region as region from accounts left join subscriptions on subscriptions.account_id = accounts.id left join invoices on invoices.subscription_id = subscriptions.id left join support_tickets on support_tickets.account_id = accounts.id where accounts.tenant_id in ('acme') and invoices.invoice_date >= date '2026-05-01' and invoices.invoice_date < date '2026-06-01' group by accounts.region limit 100
